case_title: JOSHUA TENEBIMBO VS. MONDELLO PERFORMANDCE PRODUCTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,800.00 FILED BY TENEBIMBO, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT MONDELLO PERFORMANDCE PRODUCTS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENEBIMBO, JOSHUA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENEBIMBO, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT MONDELLO PERFORMANDCE PRODUCTS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-29-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MONDELLO PERFORMANDCE PRODUCTS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENEBIMBO, JOSHUA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONDELLO PERFORMANDCE PRODUCTS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOSHUA TENEBIMBO & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE LYNN WELFRINGER, OWNER OF MONDELLO PERFORMANCE PRODUCTS, INC. MR. WELFRINGER APPEARED AT TODAY'S HEARING VIA TELEPHONE, WHICH WAS PREVIOUSLY APPROVED BY THE COURT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2016 - JUDGMENT.
